Portfolio 2024–2026
Artist Statement · 创作自述

My work moves between moving image, photography,
and design — tracing the space between
what is performed and what is truly felt.

我的创作游走于影像、摄影与设计之间，
探索表演与真实之间那片微妙的空隙。

Through each medium I ask how identity is assembled,
how self-perception shifts under pressure,
and how light and form become the language of an inner life.

I

影像作品

Moving Image

Moving Image · 01

迷失的
艺术家

The Lost Artist

Music Video · Director of Photography

After Narcissus. An artist seduced by his own reflection — where the pursuit of an idealised self curdles, quietly, into ruin.

2nd Prize · 13th Academy Award · Film & TV Society

红尘独行 · 内景 · The Lost Artist Stills

Moving Image · 02

多彩的我

Colorful Me

Short Film · Director

A single woman, four registers. The film moves between elegance and rebellion, softness and danger — probing how quickly we mistake a surface for a self.

精致 / Elegance叛逆 / Rebellion温柔 / Softness疯狂 / Danger

Colorful Me

多彩的我 · 隧道场景

II

创意摄影

Photography

Photography · 03

梅 花 王

The King of Plum Blossoms

Long Exposure · Drone Light Painting

Thirty seconds above Ming Xiaoling Mausoleum. A drone traces luminous ellipses over the ancient plum — its blossom lit from below, the orbital trail suspended like a halo.

CameraFuji GFX 100S Exposure30 s · ISO 100 · f/3 TechniqueDrone light painting LocationNanjing · 南京

III

平面设计

Graphic Design

Visual identity, poster design, and communication systems for academic and cultural contexts.

Graphic Design · 05 · Poster Design

濠鏡
研究生論壇

Hou Keang Postgraduate Symposium

2026 · University of Macau · 澳門大學

A visual identity system fusing the cable-stay geometry of Greater Bay Area infrastructure with Taoist cloud iconography — rendered in duotone blue that oscillates between the contemporary and the classical.

Poster in Situ · 海报实物展示 Poster A · Modern Blue    Poster B · Swiss Grid
Graphic Design · 06 · Event Banner

2026 · Hou Keang Postgraduate Symposium · Digital Display & Print Banner

Graphic Design · 07 · Publication Design

参会手册

Participation Handbook

Bilingual Layout · Schedule & Programme

A bilingual publication for the 2026 symposium — merging Chinese typographic tradition with contemporary grid systems.

Graphic Design · 08 · 小红书推文 · XiaoHongShu Posts

時代沙龍

Era Salon

评审专家介绍 · 获奖名单公示 · XiaoHongShu 小红书

为濠镜研究生论坛时代沙龙板块制作的系列小红书推文，包含评审专家介绍及获奖名单公示，采用竖屏滚动排版，面向各大高校在读博士、硕士研究生。

Graphic Design · Logo Design

濠镜论坛 Logo

Hou Keang Postgraduate Symposium · Visual Identity

设计理念 · Design Concept

以莲花为核心图腾，取其「出淤泥而不染」之意，象征研究生群体在学术探索中坚守本心、追求卓越的精神风貌。

祥云环绕，呼应澳门「濠镜」的历史文化底蕴，亦寓意各地青年学子汇聚湾区、共话未来。

深蓝底色与金色莲花形成冷暖对比，呈现兼具古典意蕴与现代气质的视觉语言。

Graphic Design · PPT Background Design

濠镜主题 PPT 背景图

Hou Keang Postgraduate Symposium · PPT Background Series · 八张 / 8 Slides

为 2026 濠镜研究生论坛系列活动专项设计的主题 PPT 背景图，共八张。以港珠澳大桥为核心视觉元素，融合科技感线条与湾区地标意象，构建贯穿整场论坛的完整视觉体系，统一论坛各环节的视觉呈现。
